op.ARCLIGHT.potential.1.event.descriptio.text: Battle skill Tempestuous Arc improved: After triggering additional effects, the skill recovers another 10 SP.

op.ARCLIGHT.potential.3.event.descriptio.text: Talent Wildland Trekker improved: DMG Boost effect increased to 1.3 times the original.

op.ARCLIGHT.potential.4.event.descriptio.text: Ultimate Exploding Blitz improved: Ultimate Energy cost -15%.

op.ARCLIGHT.potential.5.event.descriptio.text: Talent Wildland Trekker improved: Trigger requirement is reduced to 2 time(s).

op.ARCLIGHT.skill.EXPLODING_BLITZ.event..text: Performs a short forward dash while wreathed in arcs of electricity to deal Electric DMG and apply Electric Infliction to all enemies in the path. The lingering arcs explode after a short while, dealing another hit of Electric DMG. If the enemy has active Electric Infliction, consume the Electric Infliction and forcibly apply Electrification.

op.ARCLIGHT.skill.PEAL_OF_THUNDER.event..text: When an enemy suffers Electrification or after an enemy's Electrification is consumed. Blinks to the enemy's side to unleash a flurry of slashes that deals Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

op.ARCLIGHT.skill.SEEK_AND_HUNT_BATK.eve.text: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals {poise:0} Stagger.

op.ARCLIGHT.skill.SEEK_AND_HUNT_DIVE.eve.text: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies.

op.ARCLIGHT.skill.SEEK_AND_HUNT_FINISHER.text: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

op.ARCLIGHT.skill.TEMPESTUOUS_ARC.event..text: Instantly blinks to the enemy's side to deal 2 slashes that deal some Physical DMG. If the enemy has active Electrification, consume the Electrification to unleash an additional attack that deals Electric DMG and recovers some SP.

op.ARCLIGHT.status.WILDLAND_TREKKER_BUFF.text: Team buff from Wildland Trekker: Electric DMG Dealt +0.05% per point of Arclight's Intellect (+0.08% at T2, ×1.3 at P3). Duration 15s, does not stack.

op.ARCLIGHT.talent.HANNABIT_WISDOM_T2.ev.text: 50% chance to ignore an Arts Infliction applied on her.

op.ARCLIGHT.talent.WILDLAND_TREKKER_T1.e.text: Battle skill Tempestuous Arc improved: Triggering the additional effect 3 time(s) grants the team Electric DMG Dealt +0.05% for every point of Arclight's Intellect. This effect has a 15s duration and cannot stack.
